entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling to the Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure, my date of birth is August 22, 1990.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Let me verify that now. Perfect. How can I help today?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'd like to schedule a new patient appointment for a general checkup sometime next week, preferably in the morning.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I'll note that as a new patient consultation for a general checkup.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: We have openings next Tuesday morning with Dr. Dudy Hauser at Pivot Point Orthopedics. I can offer 10:30 a.m., 11:15 a.m., or 12:45 p.m. Which one would you like?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: I'll take the 10:30 a.m. slot, that works for me.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're booked for Tuesday, June 23rd, at 10:30 a.m. for a new patient visit. Please bring a government-issued photo ID or insurance card and a list of current medications. If you have any imaging discs, bring those too.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Got it, I'll make sure to bring all of that along. Thanks for your help, I'll see you then.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: You're welcome. See you Tuesday at 10:30 a.m.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Great, looking forward to it. Take care.
